name: F&B (Food & Beverage) Chilled Ready Meal Profile

tasks.name: F&B Equipment Config Models
tasks.description: Add Pydantic config models for F&B scenario configs (BatchCycleConfig, OvenThermalExcursionConfig, FillWeightDriftConfig, SealIntegrityFailureConfig, ChillerDoorAlarmConfig, CipCycleConfig, ColdChainBreakConfig). Extend ScenariosConfig with optional F&B fields.

tasks.name: F&B Factory Config (factory-foodbev.yaml)
tasks.description: Create F&B factory configuration with all 9 equipment groups (6 new + 3 shared), 68 signals with Modbus/OPC-UA/MQTT mappings, and F&B scenario configs. Cross-reference all addresses against PRD Appendix A/B/C.

tasks.name: Thermal Diffusion Signal Model
tasks.description: Implement truncated Fourier series thermal diffusion model (PRD 4.2.10) for product core temperature. Adaptive term count, reset capability, noise injection. S-curve heat penetration profile for food products.

tasks.name: Mixer Generator
tasks.description: Mixer equipment generator: 8 signals, 6-state batch cycle state machine (Off/Loading/Mixing/Holding/Discharging/CIP). Batch weight steps, speed ramp, torque correlation, batch_id string generation. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: Oven Generator
tasks.description: Oven equipment generator: 13 signals, 5-state machine. 3-zone PID temps with thermal coupling, product core temp via ThermalDiffusionModel, output power as correlated follower of temp error, belt speed determines product dwell. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: Filler Generator
tasks.description: Filler equipment generator: 8 signals, 5-state machine. Per-item fill weight (Gaussian around target + giveaway), item arrival gated by line_speed, hopper sawtooth depletion, reject counting on tolerance violation. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: Sealer Generator
tasks.description: Sealer equipment generator: 6 signals. Seal temp/pressure/dwell steady state during production, MAP gas mix (CO2/N2), vacuum level. Follows filler state. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: Checkweigher (QC) Generator
tasks.description: Checkweigher/metal detection generator: 6 signals. Actual weight mirrors filler fill_weight + offset, overweight/underweight counting, rare metal detect trips, throughput follows filler speed. Per-item generation. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: Chiller Generator
tasks.description: Refrigeration generator: 7 signals. Room temp via bang-bang hysteresis (sawtooth), compressor binary state, suction/discharge pressure, periodic defrost cycles, door_open discrete input. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: CIP Generator
tasks.description: CIP (Clean-in-Place) generator: 5 signals, 6-state phase sequence (Idle/Pre-rinse/Caustic/Intermediate/Acid/Final). Wash temp ramps, conductivity profile (rise during caustic, exponential decay during rinse), flow rate, cycle time counter. Register in data_engine.py.

tasks.name: Shared Generator Coupling for F&B
tasks.description: Make coder and energy generators configurable for their coupling signals (state_signal, speed_signal). Coder follows filler.state for F&B, press.machine_state for packaging. Energy follows filler.line_speed for F&B. Backward compatible defaults.

tasks.name: F&B Modbus — CDAB Encoding + Dynamic Block Sizing
tasks.description: Add CDAB float32/uint32 encode/decode, byte_order field on HoldingRegisterEntry, dynamic block sizing from config, F&B coils (100-102) and DI (100) support. Sync respects per-entry byte order.

tasks.name: F&B Modbus — Multi-Slave Oven Eurotherm UIDs
tasks.description: Add multi-slave support for oven zone controllers (UIDs 11, 12, 13). Each slave has IR block with PV/SP/output_power as int16 x10. Config-driven slave definitions. Sync loop updates secondary blocks.

tasks.name: F&B OPC-UA + MQTT Validation Tests
tasks.description: Validate OPC-UA FoodBevLine node tree and MQTT foodbev1 topic map are built correctly from F&B config. Verify all node paths match Appendix B and all topics match Appendix C. No vibration topics for F&B.

tasks.name: Batch Cycle Scenario (Mixer)
tasks.description: Batch cycle drives mixer through Loading→Mixing→Holding→Discharging sequence. 20-45 min per batch, 8-16 per shift. Batch-to-batch variation. Ground truth batch events.

tasks.name: Oven Thermal Excursion Scenario
tasks.description: One oven zone drifts from setpoint (0.1-0.3 C/min). Adjacent zones respond via thermal coupling (0.05 factor). Product core temp deviates. Recovery after 30-90 min. Analogous to DryerDrift.

tasks.name: Fill Weight Drift Scenario
tasks.description: Fill weight mean drifts from target at 0.05-0.2 g/min. Reject count increases proportionally. Recovery after 10-60 min via operator recalibration.

tasks.name: Seal Integrity Failure Scenario
tasks.description: Seal temp drops below threshold, seal pressure decreases, vacuum degrades, QC rejects spike. Line stops for seal bar replacement/adjustment. Uses existing sealer signals.

tasks.name: Chiller Door Alarm Scenario
tasks.description: Door opens, room temp rises 0.5-2 C/min, compressor cycles harder. Door close triggers first_order_lag recovery to setpoint. Duration 5-20 min.

tasks.name: CIP Cycle Scenario
tasks.description: Triggers CIP generator through Pre-rinse→Caustic→Rinse→Acid→Final phases. Production stops: mixer→Idle, filler→Off. 30-60 min per cycle, 1-3 per day. Production resumes on completion.

tasks.name: Cold Chain Break Scenario
tasks.description: Compressor locks off (failure). Room temp rises toward ambient at 0.5-1.5 C/min. Crosses 8C alarm. After repair, compressor restarts, first_order_lag recovery. 30-120 min, 1-2 per month.

tasks.name: F&B Scenario Auto-Scheduling
tasks.description: Add scheduling methods for all 7 F&B scenarios to ScenarioEngine._generate_timeline(). Update _AFFECTED_SIGNALS with F&B signal sets. Config-to-param mapping for each F&B scenario type.

tasks.name: F&B Modbus Integration Test
tasks.description: End-to-end: DataEngine + Modbus server with F&B config. Verify all F&B HR (CDAB mixer, ABCD rest), IR (int16 x10), coils, DI, multi-slave UIDs 11-13, shared energy registers.

tasks.name: F&B OPC-UA + MQTT Integration Test
tasks.description: End-to-end: DataEngine + OPC-UA server + MQTT publisher with F&B config. Verify FoodBevLine nodes, 13 MQTT topics, no vibration topics, correct payloads.

tasks.name: F&B Cross-Protocol Consistency Test
tasks.description: Verify same F&B signal values across Modbus, OPC-UA, MQTT within one engine tick. CDAB Modbus matches OPC-UA Double. Ground truth records F&B scenario events correctly.
